audit_summary.summary_text: The frontend-design skill is a creative design assistant that generates frontend code (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Vue) based on user requirements. It focuses on aesthetic guidance, typography, color, motion, and layout principles. No malicious patterns, hidden instructions, exfiltration commands, or shadow features were detected. The skill does not contain any code implementation files beyond SKILL.md, and the instructions are purely about design methodology and code generation.
